text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm out buying<n>supplies...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Gee whiz! Fancy meet'n you here!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
No! I'm out visit'n trendy spots<n>Grass 'n the
others told me 'bout!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
But it's my first time 'round here, so<n>I'm all
lost...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I brought a map, but I've been<n>walk'n 'round in
circles for a while<n>now...
choice_data_list:
Let me take a look at that map... If you want to go
here...
You should use a GPS app.
You should use a GPS app.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I brought a map, but I've been<n>walk'n 'round in
circles for a while<n>now...
choice_data_list:
Let me take a look at that map... If you want to go
here...
You should use a GPS app.
You should use a GPS app.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I look at Yukino Bijin's map and point<n>out the
path she should take to her<n>destination.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Zoinks! I've been walk'n the wrong<n>way this
whole time! It sure would've<n>been bad if I kept
going!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
You city folks are someth'n else!<n>Thanks for
point'n me in the right<n>direction!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Welp, I'll be off now! Toodles!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The sight of Yukino Bijin exploring<n>with her map
in hand makes me<n>realize that walking around
town might<n>be a good stamina training exercise.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I tell Yukino Bijin about the app that I<n>like to use.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Hot dog! Who knew such a handy<n>app existed?
It even tells ya how t'get<n>to your destination!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I won't get lost no matter where I go<n>in the city
as long as I've got this app!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Welp, I'll be off now! Toodles!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
If you incorporate more efficient<n>methods, you
can reach your goal<n>more quickly. This might be
good<n>advice for races, too.
